hudson.tasks.Shell.command:
cd /var/www/html/eol_php8_code/update_resources/connectors
### JUST A UTILITY. This one you'll need to edit the PHP file and enter wich taxon file you want to process. #php gen_higherClass.php
### OK 1of4: This will add higherClassification in taxon.tab and rebuild the DwCA. With carry-over of other extensions. ### source is: iNat.tar.gz ### generates FILENAME-with-hC.tar.gz #php dwca_utility.php _ '{"resource_id": "iNat", "task": "gen_hC_using_pID"}' #using parentNameUsageID
### OK 2of4: This use gnparser one name at a time. Not entire file. php run_gnparser_dwca.php _ '{"resource_id": "iNat-with-hC"}' #OK gen neo4j_1
### OK 3of4: Start matching taxa php match_taxa_2DH.php _ '{"resource_id": "iNat-with-hC_neo4j_1", "AncestryIndexVer": "new"}' #OK gen +_eolID exit 0
### OK 4of4: Convert taxon.tab, use EOLid value for taxonID. ### REMINDER: Multiple scinames with different taxonIDs have the same canonical thus will have the same EOLid php use_EOLid_as_taxonID.php _ '{"resource_id": "iNat-with-hC_neo4j_1_eolID"}' # gen iNat_finale php analyze_MoF.php _ '{"resource_id": "iNat_finale"}' ### rename cd /var/www/html/eol_php8_code/applications/content_server/resources_3 cp iNat_finale.tar.gz iNat_TraitBank_1_0.tar.gz ls -lt iNat_finale.tar.gz ls -lt iNat_TraitBank_1_0.tar.gz rm -f iNat_finale.tar.gz
